finding_results.notes: Re-sequenced the contact run so each beat changes risk: Nora sets a hard deadline with consequences, Eli leaves a concrete voicemail, Nora reports office escalation, and Cal's formal HR notice lands immediately after. Removed redundant dodge-loop repetition.
finding_results.summary: Communication beats now compound with distinct consequences instead of repeating call-dodge-silence.

finding_results.notes: Inserted explicit concealed financial fact (amount, timing, account movement, memo) and paired it with immediate interpersonal consequence in the same exchange when Nora withdraws relational cover and demands numeric accountability.
finding_results.summary: The accountability exchange now renders concrete economic concealment and immediate relational damage in-scene.

finding_results.notes: Rewrote both Cal voicemails into spoken-pressure cadence with interruption/restart texture ("I can't—look, I can't" and em-dash resets), preserved procedural compliance content, and made the second message distinctly sharper by escalating to an explicit HR abandonment review consequence.

Removed repeated 'He told himself' scaffolding and replaced denial beats with varied constructions: task-stacking deflection, terse interior hesitation, and action/sensory contradiction at interchange decisions.
finding_results.summary: Denial psychology now lands through differentiated sentence shapes and embodied action instead of repeated stem phrasing.

pass_summaries.summary: All packet findings for chapter_02 were addressed in-place with structural escalation and concrete financial accountability while preserving chapter continuity and voice constraints.
Adjusted Cal's voicemail voice from memo-like transcription to pressured, character-true speech with clearer first-to-second escalation while preserving continuity and policy stakes.
Applied prose/copyedit pass for chapter_02 packet findings; the recurring denial scaffold was diversified and reduced to non-repetitive forms while preserving continuity and voice.
